title: Automatic expansion of subitems (undesired)
excerpt: Hi, first post, I seem to have a view that automatically expands all subitems when you open it. It seems like a lot of people want this, but I do not lol. Can anyone tell me if I have set something up by accident? It als…

posts.author: NeilF (Neil Fisher)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, first post, I seem to have a view that automatically expands all subitems when you open it. It seems like a lot of people want this, but I do not lol. Can anyone tell me if I have set something up by accident? It also keep expanding them, even after I have collapsed them, usually a few minutes later, which is very annoying. TIA

posts.author: Kevin_M (Kevin Mamalis)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you figured out what was going on ? We have the same issue with some of our boards. I would be very interested in fixing this. Thanks in advance =)-

posts.author: DJ_S (DJ Shirley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Found the solution on another board, it is a keyboard shortcut - Ctrl+I or Cmnd+I
Hope that helps!

posts.author: Kevin_M (Kevin Mamalis)
posts.cookedHtml: That seems to have fixed the issue, thanks alot !

posts.author: mattallshops (Matt W.)
posts.cookedHtml: This was very helpful for me, too, and it would be great to have it added to the shortcuts page: monday.com Shortcuts – Support
